projectDescription: A horror-themed WebVR memory card game built with A-Frame where players race against time to match pairs before losing their soul.
keyFeatures: Immersive 3D WebVR environment with horror casino theme
Time-based challenge system with 40-second survival timer
Card matching game mechanics with flip animations
Atmospheric audio and visual effects with dynamic lighting
publicApiSurface: initGame() - Initialize game board and shuffle cards
startTimer() - Begin countdown and background music
flip(card) - Handle card flip animation and logic
die() - Game over handler with soul-loss overlay
